title: Love's Draft
content:
The draft of love was cool and sweet
    You gave me in the cup,
    But, ah, love's fire is keen and fleet,
    And I am burning up.

    Unless the tears I shed for you
    Shall quench this burning flame,
    It will consume me through and through,
    And leave but ash--a name.
meaning:
Paul Laurence Dunbar's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Love's Draft"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
